description: Style Notecatwalk takes the street sandal trend a notch higher with this pair. Wear this lovely versatile pair with harem pants, denims or leggings and look perfect. This pair is designed to Fit your foot snugly without making it seem bulky. Grab them before its too late!Product DetailsBrown sandal with a toe holder and a midfoot strap (half made of coloured elasticated fabric)A buckle detail on the strap connecting the toe holder and midfoot strapA padded and curved footbedTPU outsole with upraised heel and branded groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
